title: 風塵みたいなあたしでも

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: The Derby... The Derby? The Derby, huh? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After attaining her major goal of entering the
Classics, Mejiro Ryan is somewhat lacking in
concentration. It's called "burnout syndrome."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her roommate, meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The Derby! The Derby! Woohoo, I'm gonna be in
the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin seems to be even more enthusiastic
about her training than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an attempt to get Ryan back on track, I get her
to talk with Ines.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Ryan and her trainer! How do ya
do-do? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ines... You've been running with so much energy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Taking the lead at Tokyo Racecourse isn't
gonna be an easy task.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I definitely want to do well in this race now that
all these miracles are finally lining up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All these... miracles?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! To begin with, it's already a miracle that I
was able to come to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Mom, I'm heading off for my first day at the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text: Okay. Be careful out there!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry about us here. Just give your
best effort at everything you want to do.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right... Are you sure you'll be okay without
me? I know how tight things are here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: And someone has to look after my little sisters...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
That's very thoughtful of you. But I'm gonna tell
you something.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text: This can't be all there is to your life, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I just enjoy running, you know? It's not like I have
a promising future ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text: That's reason enough for you to go.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter whether you succeed or not. I
want you to do what you want to do, even if it
doesn't last forever.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've got no natural talent, no famous lineage, no
freedom—just a whole buncha no's!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But somehow, of all people, I get to race in the Derby with this select few?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I did the best I could with what little skills I had,
came to Tracen Academy, and even claimed
victory in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And somehow, everything at home has been fine!
That's very important! It hasn't been that long,
but even that's a miracle!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'd be lying if I said I wasn't excited. Everything's
been a miracle... So I need to make it all count.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever happens to me afterward is fine. ♪ I'm
gonna be just like you when you burned yourself
out at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I see... That's why you're working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan looks up at the sky, pondering
something. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: In my case, I guess I had everything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was called the hope of the Mejiros, so it was
only natural that I'd go to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I had no confidence in myself, and I wasted
everything that was given to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I finally woke up to that fact in the nick of time
and barely made it. And now, I'm totally spent!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm no good in the end, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I don't even deserve to line up at the
starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Is that how you feel?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, you wanna know what I think? I think that
we're all similar in some ways.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: We are?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Not realizing what's important, feeling
anxious, losing focus...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the seniors, we're still so inexperienced.
But you could say that means we have a lot of
room to grow.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We've always been together, so I know how you
shine brightest when things get tough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ines...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's not like I always gave it my all, every
single time I've been out there.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So... let's do this for real. With everything we
have, and everything we're lacking—with all that
we are.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And McQueen isn't around, so it's just the two of
us. Let's leave it all out there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh... Yeah, let's do that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run with all my strength! I'll make up for
the time I've wasted!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And as your friend, I wanna show you what I'm
capable of as a runner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new flame is lit within Ryan's smoldering heart.
It looks like the second round of the Classics will
be an exciting matchup.
